question_variants: Could you tell something about your hobbies?
Do you have any hobbies that you are proud of?
What's your favorite hobby?
Describe one of your hobbies?
key_points: （1）点明兴趣爱好，简述培养这个兴趣爱好的原因；（2）对于这一兴趣爱好的思考或感悟，你的收获。

examples.en: I like reading biographies, especially those of well-known statesmen, militarists, scientists and artists. I can learn a lot from their life histories. Reading is not like watching TV. Watching TV does not require a process of thinking activities. Reading is a proactive learning process that will make our thinking agile, so I will keep reading.
examples.zh: 我喜欢阅读传记，尤其是那些著名政治家、军事家、科学家和艺术家的传记。我可以从他们的生活经历中学到很多。阅读不像看电视，看电视不需要思考过程。阅读是一个主动的学习过程，能使我们的思维敏捷，所以我会坚持阅读。

examples.en: I like playing football. It's a very exciting game because it keeps you alert and I also enjoy the team spirit of football. For students who are getting more and more stressed, proper physical exercise can not only improve their physical fitness, but also combine work and rest, so that their intellectual level can be fully exerted, so I will stick to exercise.
examples.zh: 我喜欢踢足球。这是一项非常激动人心的运动，因为它让你保持警觉，我也喜欢足球的团队精神。对于压力越来越大的学生来说，适当的体育锻炼不仅能提高身体素质，还能劳逸结合，使智力水平得到充分发挥，所以我会坚持锻炼。

examples.en: Fishing is my favorite, because it is both fun and instructive, which has helped me to improve my power of controlling myself. Postgraduate study and research not only require me to be self-binding, but also to focus on one thing, so I like the hobbies which cultivate my qualities.
examples.zh: 钓鱼是我的最爱，因为它既有趣又有教育意义，帮助我提高了自我控制能力。研究生学习和研究不仅需要我自我约束，还需要专注于一件事，所以我喜欢培养我这些品质的爱好。

examples.en: I love traveling, which is a way to broaden my horizons, through which I can learn about different cultures of the world. Most of the time you will find that your views on your previous studies and life have changed when you enter a new environment. By traveling and changing the environment, we can re-examine ourselves and get out of trouble.
examples.zh: 我喜欢旅行，这是开阔视野的一种方式，通过旅行我可以了解世界不同的文化。很多时候，当你进入一个新环境，你会发现对自己以往学习和生活的看法发生了变化。通过旅行和改变环境，我们可以重新审视自己，走出困境。

question_variants: What are your core competences?
What do you think about your personal strengths?
Do you have any particular merits?
key_points: （1）观点：优点是什么；（2）论据：举例说明自己的优点体现在哪些事情上。

examples.en: I have a strong leadership skill while possessing a great team spirit. When I was (某个职务), I spent a lot of thoughts and organized many activities. I was responsible for budget and organization. I built (某个组织或团体) like a big family and gained unanimous praise from teachers and classmates.
examples.zh: 我有很强的领导能力，同时拥有很好的团队精神。当我是（某个职务）时，我花了很多心思组织了许多活动。我负责预算和组织。我把（某个组织或团体）建造成一个大家庭，得到了老师和同学们的一致好评。

examples.en: I've been told I have excellent people skills. When I was in college, I met many good friends of different majors through the school community. We did interesting things together after school. I also learned many other professional knowledge from them. They make my campus life more colorful.
examples.zh: 别人都说我有很好的人际交往能力。上大学时，我通过学校社团结识了许多不同专业的好朋友。放学后我们一起做有趣的事情。我也从他们那里学到了很多其他专业知识。他们让我的校园生活更加丰富多彩。

examples.en: I have a stable personality and high sense of responsibility.
examples.zh: 我性格稳重，责任心强。

question_variants: What do you think about your weaknesses/shortcoming?
key_points: 在被问到“缺点”时，要注意你所说的缺点不能是对研究生学习有绝对影响的缺点，比如懒惰、拖延症等等，可以选择具有两面性的性格特点或小缺点，比如性格内向、完美主义等等。（1）点明自己的缺点；（2）把缺点包装成优点并说说怎么做能使自己变得更好。

examples.en: Sometimes I have a hard time saying no to people, and I end up taking on more than my fair share of the work. But I'm also happy that I can help others. Therefore, I don't think it's a complete defect that I don't know how to refuse others. As long as it's within my ability, I still hope to reach out as much as possible.
examples.zh: 有时候我很难拒绝别人，最终承担了超出我份内的工作。但我也很高兴能帮助别人。因此，我认为不懂拒绝并不完全是一个缺点。只要在我能力范围内，我仍然希望尽可能伸出援手。

examples.en: I think my weakness is that I am an obsessive and I will not stop until a job is well done. Although I will spend more time and energy than others, I feel that everything is worth it when I see the results of my work. Of course, I hope that I can pay more attention to time management and improve efficiency while pursuing quality.
examples.zh: 我认为我的缺点是我有强迫症，工作不做好不会罢休。虽然我会比其他人花费更多的时间和精力，但当我看到工作成果时，我觉得一切都是值得的。当然，我希望在追求质量的同时，也能更加注重时间管理，提高效率。

examples.en: I am introverted and not good at socializing. However, I also spent a lot of time socializing with others to learn a lot of knowledge and skills that are helpful for my future development, such as... Of course, communicating with people is essential for future work and study, so I also learn to talk to people actively.
examples.zh: 我性格内向，不擅长社交。不过，我也花了很多时间与人交往，学到了很多对我未来发展有帮助的知识和技能，比如……当然，与人交流对未来的工作和学习至关重要，所以我也学着主动与人交谈。

question_variants: Where are you from?
Would you like to tell some stories about your hometown?
Could you tell something about your hometown?
key_points: （1）介绍家乡的特性（如：地理位置、特产、名人、名胜古迹，建议结合自己的专业）；（2）突出家乡的文化和历史对于自己的影响，如：家乡对自己学习所报考的专业有什么影响。

examples.en: I come from... My hometown is... My hometown is located in... Let me introduce my hometown briefly. I am honored to be here to introduce my hometown...
examples.zh: 我来自……我的家乡是……我的家乡位于……请允许我简要介绍一下我的家乡。我很荣幸能在这里介绍我的家乡……

examples.en: Beijing is an amazing city, pretty dynamic and vivid. It's very fun to live in Beijing, particularly for the youngsters. Many top universities and multinational firms can be found in the city.
examples.zh: 北京是一座令人惊叹的城市，充满活力和生机。生活在北京非常有趣，尤其是对年轻人来说。许多顶尖大学和跨国公司都坐落于此。

examples.en: Well, my hometown is a small fascinating historical city. It enjoys/hosts/boasts a large number of spectacular/magnificent historical buildings and it is also known far and wide for its natural beauties. There are thousands of visitors to my hometown in the summer time because it has pleasant weather and fancy foods.
examples.zh: 我的家乡是一个迷人的历史小城。它拥有大量壮观的历史建筑，并以其自然美景而闻名遐迩。夏天有成千上万的游客来我的家乡，因为那里气候宜人，食物精美。

examples.en: Well, it has changed dramatically over the past decade. For instance, the population size has been doubled and the city is becoming more and more overcrowded/packed. As a result, the congestion there is terrible. However, the infrastructure constructions in my hometown have been progressive while it remains green which is a miracle.
examples.zh: 在过去的十年里，它发生了巨大的变化。例如，人口规模翻了一番，城市变得越来越拥挤。结果，那里的交通拥堵很糟糕。然而，我家乡的基础设施建设一直在进步，同时保持绿化，这简直是个奇迹。

examples.en: Actually, it is a lively/bustling city that suits the youngsters the best. You know, there are plenty of entertaining amenities can be found in the heart of the city, including night clubs, bars, KTVs, cinemas with 3D Imax screens and amusement parks and anything else you could ever imagine. I would say it's just like a paradise to the youth.
examples.zh: 事实上，这是一个充满活力的繁华城市，最适合年轻人。你知道，市中心有很多娱乐设施，包括夜总会、酒吧、KTV、IMAX 3D影院、游乐园以及其他你能想到的任何东西。我会说它就像年轻人的天堂。

examples.en: Our success and failures, our happiness and sorrow, the way we get along with the world, and the way we build relationships with people are all related to our hometown, because what we have learned from childhood will affect our whole life.
examples.zh: 我们的成功与失败，我们的快乐与悲伤，我们与世界相处的方式，以及我们与人建立关系的方式，都与我们的家乡有关，因为我们从小所学将影响我们的一生。

examples.en: Even if I have tasted the delicious food all over the world, I still miss the taste of my hometown. The taste of my hometown reminds me of the warmth and the expectations of my family. These are the driving forces on my way forward.
examples.zh: 即使我尝遍了世界各地的美食，我仍然怀念家乡的味道。家乡的味道让我想起家人的温暖和期望。这些是我前进路上的原动力。

question_variants: Could you tell us something about your family?
key_points: (1) 先介绍自己家庭的一些基本情况, 如几口人, 父母的工作情况等; (2) 谈谈家庭氛围对自己产生了什么样的影响。

examples.en: Our family is a typical family of three./My family is not big, but very warm and harmonious. There are three people in my family: father, mother and I. My parents have a lot of positive impacts on my studies and life. My dad has a good sense of humor, so I am a humorous and optimistic person influenced by my father. I believe that I will deal with difficulties better than those who are pessimistic. Because when a problem arises, I accept it first, and secondly I find a solution quickly rather than immerse myself in pessimism.
examples.zh: 我们家是一个典型的三口之家。/我的家庭不大，但非常温馨和谐。我家有三口人：爸爸、妈妈和我。我的父母对我的学习和生活有很多积极的影响。我爸爸很有幽默感，所以受他的影响，我是一个幽默乐观的人。我相信我会比那些悲观的人更好地处理困难。因为当问题出现时，我首先接受它，然后迅速找到解决方案，而不是沉浸在悲观中。

question_variants: Please introduce/describe your internship briefly.
What you have learned from your internship experience?
What's the most difficult thing you have ever faced during your internship experience?
key_points: （1）在什么岗位实习；（2）实习带给你的收获是什么；（3）结合报考动机进一步阐述。

examples.en: I was an intern/I had an internship at... (实习单位) in... (时间), and as an intern in... (某岗位), my major job was.../I was mainly responsible for... In this internship, I not only learned a lot of professional knowledge, but also learned how to communicate effectively with leaders, colleagues and users, and learned to deal with interpersonal relationships, because communication and cooperation are very important at work. In the process of internship, I was more interested in... (某专业) and determined to be a practitioner of... (某专业), so I should continue to study for postgraduate in order to improve my education, and be able to enter the... (就业领域或某工作单位) which I dream of after graduation.
examples.zh: 我于……（时间）在……（实习单位）实习，担任……（某岗位）实习生，我的主要工作是……/我主要负责……。在这次实习中，我不仅学到了很多专业知识，还学会了如何与领导、同事和用户有效沟通，学会了处理人际关系，因为沟通和合作在工作中非常重要。在实习过程中，我对……（某专业）产生了更浓厚的兴趣，并决心成为……（某专业）的从业者，所以我应该继续读研以提高学历，毕业后能进入我梦想的……（就业领域或某工作单位）。

examples.en: I'm sorry. I have no internship experience, but I took part in... and won... (科研项目或竞赛等) These experiences can also help me apply the theories which I learned to practice. In addition, I have served as a cadre of community and Students' Union in the school, which has exercised my communication, leadership and thinking abilities. So I think my other practical experiences and campus activity experience can make up for the inadequacies.
examples.zh: 很抱歉，我没有实习经历，但我参加了……（科研项目或竞赛等）并获得了……。这些经历也能帮助我将所学理论应用于实践。此外，我在学校担任过社团和学生会干部，锻炼了我的沟通、领导和思考能力。所以我认为我的其他实践经历和校园活动经历可以弥补不足。

question_variants: Could you say something about your experience of scientific research?
Please describe your scientific research experience?
key_points: （1）你主持或参与的科研项目或者课题名称；（2）自己在项目中负责的内容；（3）本次科研经历的收获；（4）将科研经历与报考动机相结合。

examples.en: In the summer vacation of my junior year, under the guidance of my tutor, I independently undertook a project named.../I have been in the teacher's research group since I was a freshman, and started my scientific research exploration. I carried out an innovative experiment entitled... In this research project, I was mainly responsible for... My direct achievement is in the process of direct communication with the professors, I have deepened my views on some specific academic issues. In addition, I have also seriously discussed the future research direction with the professor.
examples.zh: 在大三暑假，在导师的指导下，我独立承担了一个名为……的项目。/我从大一开始就进入老师的研究组，开始了科研探索。我进行了一项名为……的创新实验。在这个研究项目中，我主要负责……。我的直接收获是在与教授们的直接交流过程中，加深了我对一些具体学术问题的看法。此外，我还和教授认真讨论了未来的研究方向。

question_variants: What professional books have you read before?
Could you introduce a professional book that you have read recently?
What's the main idea of the text?
key_points: （1）点明书籍名称；（2）阐述书籍的主要内容；（3）谈谈阅读感悟和收获。在准备专业书籍的介绍时，首先不要选择太过于热门的书籍，避免与其他考生准备的内容重复。其次尽量不要选择在场的面试老师们的书籍，你对书籍内容肯定不如老师本人熟悉，容易给自己挖坑。

examples.en: One of the books I'm reading recently is.../One of the most influential professional books for me is... by.../I read... on the recommendation of my undergraduate teacher./I read the books listed by the seniors, and they all recommended..., so I read this book carefully. This book introduces... (主要内容) and uses it to show... (观点). As one of the landmark works in academic history, this book has made an in-depth research and discussion of... (主要内容), and made a pioneering contribution to... (专业领域). After reading this book, the biggest gain is that I have a better understanding of... (专业问题) that I didn't understand before. In order to thoroughly understand this problem, I have also searched the relevant paper online. Now I have a deep understanding of this problem.
examples.zh: 我最近在读的一本书是……/对我影响最大的专业书籍之一是……（作者）的……。/我是在本科老师的推荐下读了……。/我读了学长学姐列出的书，他们都推荐……，所以我仔细读了这本书。这本书介绍了……（主要内容），并用它来阐述……（观点）。作为学术史上的里程碑式著作之一，本书对……（主要内容）进行了深入的研究和探讨，并对……（专业领域）做出了开创性的贡献。读完这本书，最大的收获是我对以前不太理解的……（专业问题）有了更好的理解。为了彻底理解这个问题，我还在网上搜索了相关论文。现在我对这个问题有了深刻的理解。

question_variants: Could you tell us something about your university?
key_points: （1）点明本科学校；（2）表明自己对于母校的感谢；（3）列举在学校的收获。

examples.en: I studied in.../My undergraduate school is... Although my alma mater is not as good as your school in terms of software and hardware, I did not complain about the surrounding environment and focused on improving myself, I hope to enter a larger platform through efforts. The most valuable change during my undergraduate period was that I learned to walk out of my comfort zone, because no one forced me to study in the university. I knew that I could show my competitiveness in studying and job-hunting only by forcing myself. In the university, I gained not only knowledge, but also precious feelings of teachers and students, classmates. I discussed professional issues with my classmates and participated in sports. Because of them, I also discovered my new hobbies. Many thanks to my classmates and teachers for their tolerance and help, they have made my college life more meaningful.
examples.zh: 我曾在……学习。/我的本科学校是……。虽然我的母校在软硬件方面不如贵校，但我没有抱怨周围的环境，而是专注于提升自己，希望通过努力进入更大的平台。我本科期间最宝贵的变化是我学会了走出舒适圈，因为大学里没有人强迫我学习。我知道只有逼自己一把，才能在学习和求职中展现竞争力。在大学里，我不仅收获了知识，还收获了珍贵的师生情、同学情。我和同学们讨论专业问题，一起参加体育活动。因为他们，我还发现了自己新的爱好。非常感谢同学和老师们的包容和帮助，他们让我的大学生活更有意义。

question_variants: What's your favorite subject/course?
And why?
key_points: (1) 点明本科最习惯的课程; (2) 喜欢这门课程的原因; (3) 学习这门课程的收获。

examples.en: One of my favorite courses is... during my undergraduate period./My favorite course is an elective course/compulsory course named... I learned so much from this class and the professor. She was the toughest professor I have ever met. She kept asking questions, and pointed out our mistakes strictly. In order to avoid humiliation, I studied hard for each session. I had never studied so much in preparation for a class. It taught me that I will get a lot more if I prepare well. It was a great lesson for me./The highlight of this course is not only the rich theoretical knowledge, but also the practice after the theoretical understanding. The teacher helps us deepen the understanding and reflection of the theory by leading everyone practice. I think this is the initial reason why this course attracts me. For me, the biggest benefit of this course is that I can put together the scattered information I knew before to form a systematic cognition of... In addition, I also knew many tools that can help me further study, such as...
examples.zh: 我本科期间最喜欢的课程之一是……。/我最喜欢的课程是一门选修课/必修课，名叫……。我从这门课和教授那里学到了很多。她是我见过的最严格的教授。她不停地提问，并严格指出我们的错误。为了避免丢脸，我每节课都努力学习。我从来没有为一门课准备这么多。它教会我，如果我准备充分，我会得到更多。这对我来说是很好的一课。/这门课程的亮点不仅在于丰富的理论知识，还在于理论理解之后的实践。老师通过带领大家实践，帮助我们加深对理论的理解和反思。我认为这是这门课吸引我的最初原因。对我来说，这门课最大的好处是，我可以把我以前知道的零散信息拼凑起来，形成对……的系统认知。此外，我还知道了很多可以帮助我进一步学习的工具，比如……

question_variants: Have you ever won any prizes in university?
Did you get any honors and awards at college?
key_points: (1) 点明本科所获荣誉; (2) 为之付出的努力; (3) 今后的打算。

examples.en: I got a 4.6 GPA in my university study and passed CET 4 at the grade of 580 and CET 6 at 602. Also, I passed NCRE Computer test Level II in C Language. I have won the University Scholarship for three years in succession. I got the titles of "Outstanding Student Leader" and "Merit Student" in 2019. I joined the Communist Party of China in my junior year. I have made a lot of efforts for this. Before other students got up, I began to recite the texts on the rooftop. In the evening, I won't leave unless the library was closed. Although I have paid a lot and sacrificed a lot, I think these are worth it. I also hope to seize the time and opportunity to learn more useful knowledge at the stage of postgraduate.
examples.zh: 我大学期间绩点4.6，英语四级580分，英语六级602分。此外，我还通过了C语言计算机二级考试。我连续三年获得校奖学金。2019年获得“优秀学生干部”和“三好学生”称号。大三时加入中国共产党。为此我付出了很多努力。在其他同学起床之前，我就开始在楼顶背诵课文。晚上，图书馆不关门我不会离开。虽然我付出了很多，牺牲了很多，但我觉得这些都是值得的。我也希望在研究生阶段能抓住时间和机会学习更多有用的知识。

question_variants: Please introduce your dissertation/graduation thesis to us.
Please talk about the design process of your graduation thesis.
key_points: (1) 阐述论文的基本信息; (2) 谈谈写毕业论文的收获。如果毕业论文还没有写完,也应向老师如实说明原因,然后着重谈一谈自己的开题报告,写过的相关论文,或者对整个毕业论文的设想。

examples.en: My undergraduate thesis is... (研究题目) It is mainly about... (研究内容) During preparation for this thesis, under the guidance of my supervisor, I read many relevant academic articles such as..., and referred to some literature especially the book..., which gave me lots of enlightenment. With the method of field investigation, expert interview and literature (研究方法), I analyze the... Based on... (理论基础), I proposed an idea that... (研究结论) Through this thesis, I learned a lot not only in professional aspects, but in the way of dealing with all kinds of issues, which have laid a solid foundation for my future graduate study. Through this paper, I have opened up a new research perspective for..., and opened up a new way for...
examples.zh: 我的本科论文是……（研究题目）。主要是关于……（研究内容）。在准备这篇论文的过程中，在导师的指导下，我阅读了许多相关的学术文章，如……，并参考了一些文献，尤其是……这本书，给了我很多启发。通过实地调查、专家访谈和文献（研究方法），我分析了……。基于……（理论基础），我提出了……（研究结论）。通过这篇论文，我不仅在专业方面学到了很多，而且在处理各种问题的方式上也学到了很多，这为我未来的研究生学习打下了坚实的基础。通过这篇论文，我为……开辟了新的研究视角，为……开辟了新的途径。

examples.en: I'm sorry. Because the writing time required by my college is late, so at present, I only write a paper idea. But I have made a preliminary assumption for my thesis. My paper mainly focuses on... (研究选题), and the main writing idea is... (论文思路) The significance of this thesis is... (研究价值)
examples.zh: 很抱歉。因为学院要求的写作时间较晚，所以目前我只写了论文思路。但我已经为论文做了一个初步设想。我的论文主要关注……（研究选题），主要写作思路是……（论文思路）。这篇论文的意义是……（研究价值）。

question_variants: Why do you want to go to graduate school?
Why did you prepare for the graduate school entrance exam/this year's postgraduate entrance examination?
key_points: （1）客观原因：比如未来的工作需要 （2）主观原因：比如热爱科研

examples.en: With the introduction of relevant national policies, the welfare treatment for graduate students also becomes better, and there will be certain subsidies in housing and living. In addition, education is also very important for young people to find a job and to be promoted. After considering these factors, I chose to take the postgraduate entrance examination.
examples.zh: 随着国家相关政策的出台，研究生的福利待遇也越来越好，在住房和生活上会有一定的补贴。此外，教育对年轻人找工作、升职也非常重要。综合考虑这些因素，我选择了考研。

examples.en: I have talked with some seniors before. They told me that the study at the graduate level will be more refined and systematic. The teacher will tell the students some of the most cutting-edge information and developments in the professional fields. These knowledge and information resources are important for future employment and further education, so I chose the postgraduate entrance examination.
examples.zh: 我之前和一些学长学姐聊过。他们告诉我，研究生阶段的学习会更精细、更系统。老师会告诉学生专业领域里一些最前沿的信息和发展动态。这些知识和信息资源对未来就业和深造都很重要，所以我选择了考研。

examples.en: I took the postgraduate entrance examination completely out of my interest in this major. At the same time, I also love reading and studying, so I think I am suitable for further study.
examples.zh: 我考研完全是出于对这个专业的兴趣。同时，我也喜欢读书和研究，所以我认为我适合继续深造。

question_variants: Why did you choose this major?
key_points: （1）客观原因：例如专业发展前景好、就业前景好等；（2）主观原因：从自己的能力和兴趣出发

examples.en: My tutor told me that if I want to make some achievements in my major, I need to continue to carry out in-depth research. He also encouraged me to take the postgraduate examination and gave me help and support from various professional aspects, which is the reason why I continue to apply for this major.
examples.zh: 我的导师告诉我，如果我想在我的专业上取得一些成就，就需要继续进行深入研究。他还鼓励我考研，并在专业各方面给了我帮助和支持，这就是我继续报考本专业的原因。

examples.en: My undergraduate study is... (本科专业) and I have accumulated a lot of knowledge and practical experience in this major. I think I have more advantages than other interdisciplinary students, so I choose to continue to apply for this major.
examples.zh: 我本科学习的是……（本科专业），在这个专业上我积累了很多知识和实践经验。我认为我比其他跨专业的学生更有优势，所以我选择继续报考本专业。

question_variants: Why do you change your major?
key_points: （1）从客观方面谈一谈所报考专业未来的发展前景等；（2）从主观层面谈一谈自己的兴趣、能力，以及如何对报考专业做出贡献等。

examples.en: My undergraduate major and application major are different branches of the same discipline, and there are many "intersections" between the two disciplines. In my study, I found that the professional knowledge and thinking methods of the two majors are interlinked, which greatly improved my learning efficiency and enhanced my self-confidence, so I decisively chose... (报考专业) which I would like to further study in the future.
examples.zh: 我的本科专业和报考专业是同一学科的不同分支，两个学科之间有很多“交叉点”。在学习中，我发现这两个专业的专业知识和思维方法是相通的，这大大提高了我的学习效率，增强了我的自信心，所以我果断选择了……（报考专业），未来我想深入研究它。

examples.en: During my undergraduate course, I learned about this major by chance through the teachers' narration, and found that I was very interested in this major. Since then, I often audited university classes, got to know many students and professional teachers, and often participated in their discussion and practice. I think it's very rare to find something that I'm really interested in, so I want to seize this opportunity to study and research more deeply.
examples.zh: 本科期间，我通过老师的讲述偶然了解到这个专业，并发现自己对这个专业很感兴趣。从那以后，我经常去大学旁听，认识了很多同学和专业老师，经常参与他们的讨论和实践。我觉得能找到自己真正感兴趣的东西非常难得，所以我想抓住这个机会更深入地学习和研究。

question_variants: Why did you choose our university?
Why did you choose to study at our school/institute?
key_points: （1）客观原因：学校氛围、学科排名、师资力量等；（2）主观原因：简述自己与学校的渊源。

examples.en: I'm deeply attracted by the academic atmosphere, as well as the youthful spirit of students in... (报考院校). What attracts me most is your resounding influence in the field of... (学科). And, you have many excellent teachers with professional academic knowledge and strong research abilities and I want to be guided by them in theory and practice. Location is another critical factor prompting my decision. Beijing, as the capital city of China, has provided various study and work resources for our young people, which I would never have thought without coming here. ... (报考院校) has always been my dream. During the College Entrance Examination, I failed to be enrolled in this university and now I want to fulfill my dream.
examples.zh: 我被……（报考院校）的学术氛围以及学生们的青春活力深深吸引。最吸引我的是贵校在……（学科）领域的卓越影响力。而且，贵校有许多优秀的老师，他们拥有专业的学术知识和强大的研究能力，我希望在理论和实践上得到他们的指导。地理位置是促使我决定的另一个关键因素。北京作为中国的首都，为我们年轻人提供了各种各样的学习和工作资源，这是我不来这里之前从未想过的。……（报考院校）一直是我的梦想。高考时我没能考上这所大学，现在我想实现我的梦想。

topic: 放弃工作选择考研的原因（往届生）
question_variants: Why do you want to go back to study instead of going on with your work?
key_points: （1）客观原因：先说说自己在工作中的贡献和长处，再说遇到了一些解决不了的问题，所以想继续深造；（2）主观原因：谈一谈自己的兴趣、能力、愿望等。

examples.en: I want to accumulate more knowledge of the subject and strive for greater development space in the future. I can learn in the society, too. But if I went back to school, I would have more learning partners who would help me selflessly, and also enjoy resources such as campus forum, which is the important reason why I want to go back to school.
examples.zh: 我想积累更多的学科知识，争取未来更大的发展空间。在社会上也可以学习。但如果我回到学校，我会有更多无私帮助我的学习伙伴，还能享受校园论坛等资源，这是我想回学校的重要原因。

examples.en: I think I have a certain advantage in postgraduate entrance examination compared with my classmates who have no work experience. Firstly, I have enough motivations. Because I am more...
examples.zh: 我认为与没有工作经验的同学相比，我在考研上有一定优势。首先，我有足够的动力。因为我更……（原文缺失，根据上下文补充：成熟、目标明确等）

question_variants: What will you do after graduation?
What's your future plan if you succeeded/failed in this interview?
key_points: （1）情况一：被录取 如果有幸被录取，主要围绕学习这一话题展开，规划中可以有学习、实习、竞赛、科研、社会实践、考博等。（2）情况二：未被录取 如工作的同时准备再战等。

examples.en: If I were lucky enough to be accepted, I would still focus on my studies. First of all, I will establish a reasonable knowledge structure, broadly study the basic knowledge of the subject, and thoroughly understand all aspects of the research field. Secondly, I will strive to master the methods and skills of independent research. Thirdly, I will prepare at least two academic articles and strive to publish them in core journals.
examples.zh: 如果我有幸被录取，我仍会专注于学习。首先，我要建立合理的知识结构，广泛学习学科基础知识，深入了解研究领域的各个方面。其次，我会努力掌握独立研究的方法和技巧。第三，我会准备至少两篇学术文章，力争在核心期刊上发表。

examples.en: If I am lucky enough to be admitted, what I hope most is to be able to participate in scientific research projects with my teachers. By this way, we can cultivate our abilities of finding problems, consulting literature, summarizing, designing experiments, organizing and implementing, and expressing scientific research.
examples.zh: 如果我有幸被录取，我最希望的是能和老师一起参与科研项目。通过这种方式，我们可以培养发现问题、查阅文献、总结归纳、设计实验、组织实施以及科研表达的能力。

examples.en: I have always hoped to work in the Academy after graduating in the future, so if I am lucky enough to be admitted, I hope to finish my studies and thesis well, and make a preparation for the exam in advance.
examples.zh: 我一直希望未来毕业后能留在研究所工作，所以如果我有幸被录取，我希望顺利完成学业和论文，并提前为考试做准备。

examples.en: If I am not accepted, I will reflect on my learning problems. Besides, I will keep improving myself and make good use of spare time to prepare for the next postgraduate entrance examination.
examples.zh: 如果我没被录取，我会反思自己的学习问题。此外，我会不断提升自己，利用业余时间为下一次考研做准备。

topic: 研究生阶段感兴趣的研究方向和原因
question_variants: What research direction are you interested in and why?
key_points: （1）情况一：如已确定研究方向 ① 点明这一研究方向；② 从客观角度说一说为什么选择这一研究方向，比如研究条件、社会需求等；③ 从主观角度谈一谈为什么选择这一研究方向，例如结合个人兴趣和能力等。（2）情况二：若未确定研究方向 如实告知老师，并说明自己会尽快通过各种途径去找到自己感兴趣且适合自己的研究方向。

examples.en: After comprehensive consideration, I chose to do my favorite research in... (感兴趣的研究方向) at the stage of graduate./At present, I hope to choose... (感兴趣的研究方向) Of course, I will also refer to the suggestions of future mentors to choose a suitable direction.
examples.zh: 经过综合考虑，我选择在研究生阶段从事我最喜欢的……（感兴趣的研究方向）研究。/目前，我希望选择……（感兴趣的研究方向）。当然，我也会参考未来导师的建议，选择一个合适的方向。

examples.en: When I think about my research direction, I find that research environment, peers and so on are all my resources and constraints. What I want to pursue is to maximize the research results under the constraints. After the introduction of the seniors and my own careful thinking, I chose to carry out the research in... (研究方向)
examples.zh: 当我思考我的研究方向时，我发现研究环境、同行等既是我的资源也是约束。我想要追求的是在约束条件下最大化研究成果。经过学长学姐的介绍和我自己的仔细思考，我选择在……（研究方向）开展研究。

examples.en: As far as I know, mutual learning between disciplines is the easiest way to have results. My undergraduate major is..., and I am hooked on... (研究方向) Considering that I can use my undergraduate knowledge to do more extensive research in..., so I chose this direction.
examples.zh: 据我所知，学科之间的相互学习是最容易出成果的。我的本科专业是……，我对……（研究方向）很着迷。考虑到我可以利用我的本科知识在……方面进行更广泛的研究，所以我选择了这个方向。

examples.en: I'm sorry. I haven't chosen a research direction yet. I think that the choice of research direction needs to match with personal ability, so after the retest, I will definitely read more top journals in the professional field and find research opportunities through reading academic articles, so as to determine my own research direction. More importantly, I hope I can ask my tutor more later, and reasonably measure my personal level at this stage.
examples.zh: 很抱歉，我还没有确定研究方向。我认为研究方向的选择需要与个人能力相匹配，所以复试后，我一定会多读专业领域的顶级期刊，通过阅读学术文章寻找研究机会，从而确定自己的研究方向。更重要的是，我希望以后能多请教导师，合理衡量自己现阶段的人个水平。
